text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
One day, Matikanefukukitaru shows<n>up with quite
a difficult request.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Ummm... I don't suppose you would<n>approve of
me giving up on studying<n>for this test, would you?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: I knew it. Fine. I just wanted to put it<n>out there.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Sigh... No way around this, huh? Isuppose this calls for me to unleashmy true power. Or even better yet, myspiritual power!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Grr... Ryaaah!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
What do you make of that, Trainer?!<n>My power is
so great, the cherry<n>blossoms are all in full bloom...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Wait, what?! Cherry blossoms?!<n>Where did
Trainer go?!
I'm glad you've made it, Fukukitaru.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Is that... me?! What?! I didn't know I<n>had a
doppelganger!

text_block_list.name: Shiraoki (?)
text_block_list.text:
It is I, Shiraoki. I have taken hold of<n>your body as a
way of manifesting<n>myself.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Shiraoki?! Uhh, what is going on right<n>now?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Wait! Where are you going?!<n>P-please, wait a
moment!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff... H-how did I end upracing against Shiraoki?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Uuugh... Of course the great Shiraoki<n>would be this
fast! But there's<n>something different about me...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: My body feels so light!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Phew... To think I get to run with<n>Shiraoki. It's a
dream come true!

text_block_list.name: Shiraoki (?)
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Hold onto this feeling. Even<n>after you
awake, hold onto it...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: ...Trainer... I think I'm finally awake.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: That's not what I mean! I've beenawakened to a new power!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I'm not entirely sure what she<n>means, but her
running is certainly<n>improving!
